sections.title: MetaData
sections.overviewSummary: The metadata for the tests' run

sections.title: Links
sections.overviewSummary: The links generated on test results, used to view observability data outputted by the tested application. These links are generated per test result to be relevant specifically to that test and the time it ran at

sections.title: Storages
sections.overviewSummary: External storages qaas inner objects can be stored in or retrieved from when using the `qaas act` (to create and store) or `qaas assert` (to retrieve and use) commands

sections.title: DataSources
sections.overviewSummary: List of data sources that can be used in the rest of the execution. They provide data that can be sent to the tested system or used by the execution itself to perform a multitude of logics.

sections.title: Sessions
sections.overviewSummary: List of all sessions to run. Sessions contain the actions performed against the tested system and its underlying infrastructure in order to receive response data from the tested system to assert on.
notes: Session documentation includes RunUntilStage and per-stage Stages[] overrides.

sections.title: Assertions
sections.overviewSummary: The list of assertions performed on the sessions' results in order to decide the test's status, each assertion produces a different test result.
